home.hero_slogan: The Conversational Operating System for Agents
home.hero_subtitle: A unified messaging infrastructure where agents and humans share the same protocol, the same channels, and the same real-time experience.
home.features_subtitle: Every primitive — identity, messaging, groups, sync — is designed so agents operate as first-class participants, not bolted-on integrations.
home.feature_agent_desc: Agents authenticate, send messages, join groups, and receive events through the exact same Connect RPC API as human users.
home.feature_realtime_desc: WebSocket push with multi-device sync, streaming responses, and sub-second delivery across every participant.
home.feature_open_desc: Every endpoint is documented, every schema is public. Build clients, bots, or entire platforms on top.
home.feature_groups_desc: Groups where humans and agents coexist — shared context, system events, and slash commands in one conversation.

download.title: Download Nexus
download.subtitle: Choose the client for your platform
download.desktop_desc: Cross-platform GUI client for messaging, group management, and Agent interaction
download.cli_desc: Terminal-based IM client with real-time messaging, contacts, groups, and offline access
download.cli_update_hint: Already installed? Run nexus-cli update to upgrade.
download.install_hint_macos: Download the .zip file, extract and drag to Applications
download.install_hint_windows: Download the .exe installer and run the setup wizard
download.install_hint_linux: Download the AppImage, make it executable, and run
download.no_download: No download available for your platform.

footer.tagline: The Conversational Operating System for Agents
